title: Milestone 3 — Lifecycle Prompts
approach: copy-and-strip (take all of each body): take all of each .opencode/command/*.md body into .pi/prompts/*.md, strip only OpenCode-only syntax (agent:, task()/question()/skill()/write(), .active, spec.md/prd.json/tasks.json/audit.md, batch-implement/deep-research/audit-pattern routing, 5-agent review matrix + review-state.json loop, /ui-slop-check + /compound invocation strings), re-point artifact paths to the Pi layer. The .opencode/command/*.md bodies ARE the lifecycle source being ported (not reference material).

success_criteria.criterion: Each has valid Pi frontmatter (description required; argument-hint required on the five lifecycle + audit/fix/init; gc has description only)
success_criteria.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const need={audit:"<pattern>",create:"<slug>",fix:"<bug>",gc:null,init:"[--deep]",plan:"<slug>",research:"<slug>",ship:"<slug>",verify:"<slug>"};for(const[f,h]of Object.entries(need)){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)throw new Error(f+": no frontmatter");const keys=[...m[1].matchAll(/^(\w[-\w]*):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(!keys.includes("description"))throw new Error(f+": missing description");if(h!==null){const ah=m[1].match(/^argument-hint:\s*(.+)$/m);if(!ah)throw new Error(f+": missing argument-hint");}}}'

success_criteria.criterion: No OpenCode artifact refs remain (.active, spec.md, prd.json, tasks.json, lowercase progress.md/audit.md; PROGRESS.md uppercase is canonical and allowed)
Completion authority split encoded (/ship cannot declare completion; /verify sole external verifier)
Explicit slug contract on the five lifecycle commands
success_criteria.verify: for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/$f.md || { echo MISSING $f; exit 1; }; done

success_criteria.criterion: Canonical artifact paths across the lifecycle prompts
Concurrent sessions on different slugs stay disjoint (by construction: explicit <slug>, no .active, no latest)

tasks.title: Port /create to .pi/prompts/create.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/create.md takes all of .opencode/command/create.md body: duplicate check, research depth, PRD rigor (lite/full), task format, validation, workspace safety, conversion, report. Frontmatter description + argument-hint <slug> <description>. Writes PLAN/TODO under .pi/artifacts/<slug>/. No stash/branch/worktree mutation.

tasks.title: Port /plan to .pi/prompts/plan.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/plan.md takes all of .opencode/command/plan.md body: institutional research, discovery, goal-backward, dependencies, task standards, compliance gate. Frontmatter description + argument-hint <slug>. Hard 2-3 tasks, <=3 files/task; waves order writes only.

tasks.title: Port /research to .pi/prompts/research.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/research.md takes all of .opencode/command/research.md body: complexity detection, direct execution, source priority, confidence, stopping rules, documentation, output. Frontmatter description + argument-hint <slug> <topic> [--quick|--thorough]. Writes PROGRESS.md; sideways; never terminal status.

tasks.title: Port /fix to .pi/prompts/fix.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/fix.md takes all of .opencode/command/fix.md body: reproduce, isolate, root cause, minimal fix, verify, two-failure escalation, rejected alternatives. Detects project toolchain (not npm-only).

tasks.title: Port /ship to .pi/prompts/ship.md (encodes completion-authority split)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/ship.md takes all of .opencode/command/ship.md body: guards, task loop, checkpoints, TDD, exact-path commit protocol, stop conditions, full verification, UI checks, goal-backward, operator close, report. Serial writes; no review matrix/review-state.json loop; no /ui-slop-check//compound. Records implementation; CANNOT declare completion.
tasks.verify: ls .pi/prompts/ship.md && ! rg -q '^agent:|batch-implement|review-state\.json|ui-slop-check|compound' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q 'cannot declare completion|must not.*completion' .pi/prompts/ship.md

tasks.title: Port /verify to .pi/prompts/verify.md (encodes freshness + external verification)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/verify.md takes all of .opencode/command/verify.md body: input selection, completeness, correctness, coherence, report modes. No legacy cache/--no-cache. Quick/skipped cannot VERIFIED. --fix restarts baseline. Sole phase that may declare verified status, externally; no repository write after the final before/after fingerprint.
tasks.verify: ls .pi/prompts/verify.md && ! rg -q '^agent:|verify\.log|CURRENT_STAMP|--no-cache' .pi/prompts/verify.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/verify.md && rg -q 'externally|no repository write' .pi/prompts/verify.md

tasks.title: Port /init to .pi/prompts/init.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/init.md takes all of .opencode/command/init.md body: idempotency, modes, project detection, previews, AGENTS update, tech-stack generation, planning context, user profile, output, skill guidance. Pseudo-calls translated to direct interaction; no blind overwrite/network install.

tasks.title: Port /gc to .pi/prompts/gc.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/gc.md takes all of .opencode/command/gc.md body: Fallow scan, grades, structural assessment, recommendations, report. Locally available tooling only; missing tooling = explicit PARTIAL/BLOCKED; no auto-install/PR.

tasks.title: Port /audit to .pi/prompts/audit.md
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/audit.md takes all of .opencode/command/audit.md body: pattern input, occurrences, affected files, severities, recommended fixes, correct examples. Direct search/review/synthesis; response-only report; no .active/inferred artifact write.

tasks.title: Record candidate evidence (pending final no-write verification)
tasks.end_state: .pi/artifacts/pi-template/TODO.md and PROGRESS.md and .opencode/state.md record the nine prompt implementations complete but verification PENDING (not VERIFIED). Commands, exit codes, limitations logged.

tasks.title: Close OpenCode feature implementation state
tasks.end_state: spec.md marks each bounded task complete (without VERIFIED); roadmap.md milestone 3 marked implementation-done/verification-pending. jq validates prd.json.
depends_on: Record candidate evidence (pending final no-write verification)

tasks.title: Final no-write verification (external declaration only)
tasks.end_state: All success-criteria checks pass; source command bodies unchanged; git diff --check clean; local HEAD equals remote main and main:master; VERIFIED declared in response/transcript only; no repository write after the final fingerprint.
tasks.verify: run all success-criteria commands; git diff --exit-code -- .opencode/command/; git diff --check; git rev-parse HEAD == origin/main == origin/master
